creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
grahamperrin@momh167-gjp4-8570p:~ % date ; uname -v
Sun Dec 23 11:50:37 GMT 2018
FreeBSD 13.0-CURRENT r342020 GENERIC 
grahamperrin@momh167-gjp4-8570p:~ % pkg query '%o %v %R' firefox firefox-i18n xpi-quick-locale-switcher
www/firefox 64.0_3,1 FreeBSD
www/firefox-i18n 64.0_2 FreeBSD
www/xpi-quick-locale-switcher 1.7.8.5 FreeBSD
grahamperrin@momh167-gjp4-8570p:~ % 

I see no way to switch locale. NB bug 221916

I toyed with manual installation of the Français Language Pack
<https://addons.mozilla.org/addon/fran%C3%A7ais-language-pack/> 
– no difference, as far as I can tell, so I disabled this extension.
